curation_notes: The patch commit d805d31 fixes XSS by adding $escapetool.xml() and $escapetool.javascript() calls around user-controlled and translation-rendered content. The primary vulnerability is in LoginUIExtension.vm where $request.identityOAuth (a GET parameter) flows into $statusMsg and is rendered unescaped in an HTML comment. Secondary locations are the t and tp translation macros in IdentityOAuthConfigMacros.vm which output raw translation strings without escaping. WebHome.xml also received escaping fixes for rendered translations. The 3 translation .properties files had only i18n string updates. Locations derived from both the advisory description (which points to LoginUIExtension) and the patch diff.
